plugins.photosPermission: Dispatcher needs photo access so you can optionally add a picture of yourself and your vehicle during setup.
Dispatcher needs photo access so you can optionally add a picture of yourself and your vehicle during setup.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Dispatcher does not save photos to your library.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Dispatcher uses your location to match you with nearby rides while you’re using the app.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Dispatcher needs Always location so we can match you with rides even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Dispatcher needs Always location so we can match you with rides even when the app is in the background.
